steps.title: Find the radius
steps.content:
The slant segment $AB$, the cone height, and the radius form a right triangle. Use the Pythagorean theorem:
$$r^2=84^2-42^2=7056-1764=5292$$

steps.title: Use the cone volume formula
steps.content:
The cone volume is
$$V=\frac{1}{3}\pi r^2h$$
Substitute $r^2=5292$ and $h=42$:
$$V=\frac{1}{3}\pi(5292)(42)=74088\pi$$
Since $V=k\pi$, $k=74088$. The answer is 74088.
